// who I am

ABOUT ME

Obinna Ajoku
AI & Workflow Automation Expert

// professional_summary.log

I started my career in operations, where I managed workflows, tracked data, and experienced firsthand how inefficient manual processes can slow down business growth.

Today, I help businesses eliminate those inefficiencies.

As an AI & Workflow Automation Expert, I design and implement systems that automate repetitive tasks, organise data, and connect tools — so teams can work faster, smarter, and with fewer errors.

I focus on building simple and complex, reliable systems that are easy to use and scalable as businesses grow.

// core_expertise.json

WHAT I DO

[01] WORKFLOW_AUTOMATION
Workflow Automation

Automating repetitive tasks to reduce manual effort and improve efficiency — so your team focuses on what actually matters.

[02] SYSTEM_INTEGRATION
System Integration

Connecting tools like CRMs, forms, email, and communication platforms into one seamless, always-on operation.

[03] CRM_SYSTEM_DESIGN
CRM System Design

Building structured systems for lead tracking and customer management — with deduplication, scoring, and automated follow-ups.

[04] DATA_ORGANISATION
Data Organisation

Creating clean, reliable databases for better decision-making — structured, scalable, and easy to navigate.

// case_studies[]

PROJECTS

[01] AI_REAL_ESTATE_LEAD_QUALIFIER
n8nOpenAI NotionGoogle Sheets GmailSlack Realty API
▶ watch_demo.mp4 — full walkthrough on YouTube
⚠ Problem
AI-Powered Real Estate Lead Qualification System

Built an intelligent end-to-end pipeline that qualifies real estate leads using AI, fetches matching property listings from a live API, and routes decisions through a dual-approval workflow.

  • Leads manually reviewed by agents
  • No automated property matching
  • Slow agent & manager approval process
  • No centralised lead database or log
⚙ Solution

Multi-stage n8n pipeline with AI sub-workflow & dual approval:

  • Lead form triggers Validate & Normalize
  • AI Lead Qualifier scores lead (Hot/Warm/Cold)
  • Realty API fetched for matching listings
  • Lead logged to Notion CRM & Google Sheets
  • Slack message sent to agent for review
  • Agent approves → Manager approval triggered
  • Gmail sends result + Sheets updated automatically
📈 Result
  • AI qualifies every lead instantly
  • Matching properties suggested automatically
  • Dual approval — agent then manager
  • Full trail in Notion & Google Sheets
  • Clients notified via Gmail automatically
  • Zero manual coordination needed
[02] CRYPTO_MARKET_PULSE
n8nGroq / Llama 3.3 70B CoinGecko APITelegram Structured Output
▶ watch_demo.mp4 — full walkthrough on YouTube
⚠ Problem
AI-Powered Crypto Market Briefing System

Built an automated market-intelligence pipeline that pulls live crypto data, analyses it with AI, and delivers a formatted briefing to Telegram — replacing the daily manual chart-checking routine.

  • Manual chart-checking across multiple assets daily
  • No consistent way to separate real moves from noise
  • Time-consuming, repetitive, and error-prone
  • No automated, structured market summary
⚙ Solution

End-to-end n8n pipeline with parallel data fetch & AI analysis:

  • Trigger starts the workflow on demand
  • Two CoinGecko API calls fetch market & trending data in parallel
  • Data cleaned into a single structured snapshot
  • Winner, loser & averages computed in code for accuracy
  • AI (Llama 3.3 70B) scores each coin — Bullish / Bearish / Neutral
  • Structured output parser enforces clean, consistent results
  • Formatted briefing delivered automatically to Telegram
📈 Result
  • Analyst-grade briefing generated instantly
  • Runs end to end in under 2 seconds
  • Accurate stats — computed in code, never guessed
  • Consistent per-coin signals with real 24h / 7d data
  • Fully autonomous, runs on free infrastructure ($0)
[03] GHL_SNAPSHOT_DEPLOYMENT_SYSTEM
GoHighLevelSnapshots Client OnboardingSub-Accounts Templating
⚠ Problem
Repeatable Client Onboarding at Scale

Every new client account was being built from scratch — the same pipelines, workflows, and tags rebuilt by hand each time.

  • Onboarding a new client took days, not hours
  • Configuration drifted between accounts — no two identical
  • Manual rebuilds introduced errors and missed assets
  • No standard definition of a properly configured account
⚙ Solution

Built a reusable snapshot system for one-click client deployment:

  • Configured a reference sub-account as the source of truth
  • Created a named snapshot with selective asset control
  • Included 17 tags, 5 workflows, email/SMS templates & trigger links
  • Deliberately excluded unused assets to keep deployments clean
  • Deployed the snapshot into a new client sub-account
  • Resolved asset conflicts on load, choosing exactly what to overwrite
  • Verified every asset landed correctly in the destination account
📈 Result
  • New client accounts deployed from template, not rebuilt
  • Consistent configuration across every sub-account
  • Onboarding time cut from days to minutes
  • Selective asset control — deploy only what each client needs
  • Reusable system, not a one-off build
[04] GHL_AGENCY_INFRASTRUCTURE
GoHighLevelWhitelabel DNS / CNAMESub-Accounts Agency Setup
⚠ Problem
Agency Whitelabel & Sub-Account Provisioning

An agency running client accounts on GoHighLevel needed the platform to look and behave like their own product — not a rented tool.

  • Platform branded as GHL, not the agency
  • No custom domain — clients logging into a generic URL
  • Sub-accounts provisioned ad hoc with no standard
  • User roles and access not consistently structured
⚙ Solution

Full agency-level platform configuration:

  • Provisioned client sub-accounts with correct account type, timezone & business profile
  • Applied whitelabel branding across the platform
  • Configured whitelabel domain via CNAME DNS records
  • Configured API domain for branded links and forms
  • Structured team access with agency-owner, agency-admin & account-admin roles
  • Verified DNS propagation and domain resolution end to end
📈 Result
  • Platform fully branded to the agency — clients never see GHL
  • Branded login and link domains live and verified
  • Sub-account provisioning standardised, not improvised
  • Role-based access control across agency and client accounts
  • Foundation in place for repeatable client onboarding
[05] N8N_LEAD_INTAKE_PIPELINE
n8nOpenAIAirtable GmailTally Form
⚠ Problem
AI-Powered Lead Intake & CRM Pipeline

Built a fully automated n8n pipeline that captures Tally form submissions, scores them with AI, deduplicates records in Airtable, and routes follow-up emails automatically.

  • Manual lead entry into CRM
  • Duplicate records polluting database
  • No AI-based lead scoring
  • Follow-ups missed or delayed
⚙ Solution

End-to-end n8n pipeline:

  • Webhook captures Tally form submission
  • Data cleaned & normalised
  • OpenAI sub-workflow scores, summarises & categorises lead
  • Airtable searched for duplicate email/phone
  • Existing records updated; new records created
  • Follow-up email routed by lead score
📈 Result
  • Zero duplicate records in CRM
  • AI scoring on every lead — instantly
  • Correct follow-up sent automatically
  • Full audit trail in Airtable
  • Runs 24/7 with no manual input
[06] AI_CLAIMS_CLASSIFIER
n8nWebhookOpenAI NotionGmailGoogle Sheets
⚠ Problem
AI Claims Classifier & Auto-Routing System

Built an intelligent claims pipeline that classifies submissions by severity and routes them to the right team and tools instantly.

  • Claims manually reviewed and sorted
  • No consistent severity classification
  • Critical issues delayed in generic inbox
  • Data scattered across disconnected tools
⚙ Solution

5-stage n8n automation pipeline:

  • Webhook captures incoming claim
  • Validate & Normalize cleans input
  • AI Classifier assigns severity level
  • Router branches to Critical / Moderate / Minor
  • Each branch: Notion page → Gmail alert → Sheets row
📈 Result
  • Zero manual claim sorting
  • Critical claims escalated instantly
  • Full audit trail in Notion & Sheets
  • Team notified automatically via Gmail
  • Scalable to any claim volume
[07] LUMA_AESTHETICS_CRM_BUILD
GoHighLevelCRM Automation PipelinesSmart ListsCalendar
⚠ Problem
Luma Aesthetics — Full CRM & Automation Build

A growing aesthetics clinic had no structured CRM. Leads arrived via web form but were untracked, untagged, and unscored — resulting in missed follow-ups and no revenue visibility per contact.

  • No lead segmentation or treatment tagging
  • No pipeline to track enquiry-to-client journey
  • No automated follow-up or internal alerts
  • No calendar booking integrated with CRM
  • No revenue or treatment value tracked per lead
⚙ Solution

Built the full GHL CRM from scratch across two automation phases:

  • Phase 1: Form submission → tag lead, update consultation status, delay 1 min, send SMS + email, trigger internal notification, route by treatment interest across 6 branches (Botox, Filler, Laser, HydraFacial, PRP, Body Contouring)
  • Each branch: create opportunity in "LumaAesthetics – Client Journey" pipeline, add treatment tag, update Treatment Value field
  • Phase 2: Staff-Approved tag → create New Appointment opportunity, send receipt email, add availability task
  • Built Luma Aesthetics Free Consultation calendar linked to booking widget
  • Smart list configured with Treatment Value, Primary Interest, and Consultation Status columns
📈 Result
  • 6 treatment branches fully automated
  • Pipeline: New Enquiry → Consultation → Conversion
  • Treatment value tracked per contact from day one
  • Calendar bookings auto-linked to contact records
  • Team notified within 60 seconds of each new lead
  • Zero manual triage from intake to booking

AirtableZapier FormsEmailSlack

Automated Lead Capture & CRM Tool

Designed and implemented a fully automated lead management system to eliminate manual tracking and improve response time.

  • No visibility into lead status
⚙ Solution

Structured automation with a clear 4-step flow:

  • Notification sent via email/Slack
  • Follow-up task triggered automatically
📈 Result

  • Improved response time significantly
  • Zero missed leads
  • Clear, trackable pipeline
